\tzpentry{ID3476}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3476 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ A(\rho,\varphi) = A_{\text{circ}}(\rho) \cdot \Big[1 + \sum_{k} \epsilon_k(\rho)\cos(m_k\varphi + \phi_k)\Big], \]
